positioning_locked.q: Is there a one-line outcome promise from product-intelligence?

channel_set_defined.q: Are target channels explicit (PH, email, social, ads)?

assets_within_limits.q: Do PH tagline, ad text, and tweets meet character limits?

claims_evidence_backed.q: Are metrics and features cited from product profile?

cta_consistent.q: Is the primary CTA consistent across assets (try / waitlist / demo)?
